name: Junk Defender
name_jp: ジャンク・ディフェンダー
desc: When an opponent's monster declares a direct attack: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. Once per turn, during either player's turn: You can have this card gain 300 DEF until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff: When an opponent's monster declares a direct attack: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. Once per turn, during either player's turn: You can have this card gain 300 DEF until the end of this turn.
eff: When an opponent's monster declares a direct attack: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. Once per turn, during either player's turn: You can have this card gain 300 DEF until the end of this turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
